title: T-030 — UI: shipping_dashboard page (SHIP-022) (11-shipping-j)
prompt:
# T-030 — Shipping Dashboard page

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-022 Shipping Dashboard (referenced via §15.1), §2 Metryki sukcesu (KPIs)
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-022 — Shipping Dashboard
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/dashboard.jsx:1-224 (shipping_dashboard)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component dashboard with KPI tiles, alerts panel, activity feed, and integration health (D365 outbox queue + DLQ).

## Implementation contract
1. `/(shipping)/dashboard/page.tsx` (RSC under withOrgContext) calls 4 parallel KPI queries: `getShippingKpis`, `getShippingAlerts`, `getShippingActivity`, `getIntegrationHealth`.
2. KPI tiles row 1 (per dashboard.jsx prototype): Open SOs, SOs Allocated, Picks In Progress, Shipments Today, OTD %, Allergen Conflicts Open.
3. KPI tiles row 2: D365 outbox queue depth (consumer of T-029 shipping_outbox_events.status='pending'), DLQ count, last_d365_success_at, critical_qa_holds_blocking (T-013 consumer).
4. Alerts panel: list of `shipping_alerts` view rows (computed from outbox/holds/cancellations).
5. Activity feed: latest 50 shipping_audit_log entries (paginated).
6. SWR refresh interval 30s; manual refresh button + last_synced_at.
7. BL-SHIP-11 fix: global topbar search wired to actual SO/customer/shipment lookup (was static stub).
8. Permission gate: `ship.dashboard.view`. DLQ section additionally gated by `ship.dlq.replay` for Replay actions.
9. Four states + i18n `shipping.dashboard.*`.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/dashboard.jsx:1-224` (shipping_dashboard). Verify:
- KPI tile grid (2 rows of 6 tiles)
- Alerts card on right
- Activity feed under tiles
- Integration health card (D365 queue + DLQ)
- Search input in topbar (BL-SHIP-11 fix wires it)

Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/dashboard/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/dashboard/_components/kpi-tiles.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/dashboard/_components/alerts-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/dashboard/_components/activity-feed.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/dashboard/_components/integration-health.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_components/global-search.tsx [create — BL-SHIP-11 fix shared]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/dashboard/__tests__/kpi-tiles.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/dashboard.jsx:1-224, then it has the same 2-row KPI tile grid + alerts panel + activity feed + integration health card — RTL snapshot + Playwright screenshot.
2. Given URL ?refresh=30, when page renders, then SWR refresh interval is 30s (verified via fake timers / network log).
3. Given a DLQ entry exists, when the integration health card renders, then DLQ count > 0 is shown and Replay button visible only to ship.dlq.replay holders.
4. Given session lacks ship.dashboard.view, when page accessed, then a 403 page renders (or redirect to default).
5. Given the global search input is used to query 'SO-2026-00001', when the user submits, then router.push to /(shipping)/orders/<id> (BL-SHIP-11 fix wires the static stub to real lookup).
6. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + 4-state screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL asserting parity + SWR interval + DLQ visibility gate + global search routing + permission gate + four states.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run kpi-tiles.test.tsx`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-dashboard.spec.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not perpetuate BL-SHIP-11 static search stub.
- Do not regress accessibility.
- Do not implement HAZMAT/EUDR badges (Phase 2 per BL-SHIP-13).
- Do not load all KPI queries serially — parallel fetch only.

pipeline_inputs.description: SHIP-022 Shipping Dashboard with KPI tiles + alerts + activity + integration health + BL-SHIP-11 global search fix.
pipeline_inputs.details: 4 parallel KPI queries via Drizzle. SWR refresh 30s. Replay DLQ gated by ship.dlq.replay (consumer of T-029).
out_of_scope: Do not implement Server Actions here.
Do not implement HAZMAT/EUDR badges (P2 BL-SHIP-13).
cross_module_dependencies: 01-npd/T-001 (product FG SSOT — variance_tolerance_pct + allergen attributes; coverage hygiene per R3 audit 2026-05-14)
09-quality/T-064 (consume gate — dashboard DLQ replay and hold indicators consume holdsGuard; per 2026-05-14 audit)
acceptance_criteria: Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/dashboard.jsx:1-224, then same 2-row KPI tile grid + alerts + activity feed + integration health card match prototype (structural parity checklist).

Given URL ?refresh=30, when page renders, then SWR refresh interval is 30s; AND given DLQ entry exists, when integration health card renders, then DLQ count > 0 and Replay button visible only to ship.dlq.replay holders (via 09-quality T-064 holdsGuard status reflected in KPI tiles).
Given session lacks ship.dashboard.view, when page accessed, then 403/redirect; AND given global search 'SO-2026-00001', when submit, then router.push to /(shipping)/orders/<id> (BL-SHIP-11).
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + 4-state screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
test_strategy: RED: RTL parity + SWR interval + DLQ visibility gate + global search routing + permission gate + four states.
risk_red_lines: Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
Do not load KPI queries serially — parallel fetch only.
Do not bypass the 09-quality consume gate (T-064 v_active_holds) — dashboard hold status must reflect holdsGuard state in real time.
